productDisplayName: Puma Men SL Tech Lo NM Basic Black Casual Shoes
description: These SL Tech Lo shoes from puma are a perfect choice for all speed freaks. These shoes are great for regular wear since their attractive design looks super hot when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperSynthetic leather uppers for durability and protectionPerforations around the collar for better breathabilityStitch detailing for added style and reinforcementLace-ups for snug FitLightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for extra comfortBrand name on the tongue and cat logo on the forefootAppliqued formstripe panels on the sidesMidsoleRemovable insole that can be replaced with a medical orthoticPhylon midsole for lightweight designOutsoleRubber traction outsole with wrap rubber heel bumperMidfoot bridge provides full pedal control
